title: Malice Manifest
description: A pack that changes the common hostile mob into much simpler and cartoons version.
body:
# Description
**A simple pack that changes the zombie, skeleton,enderman,spider into simpler into much simpler and cartoony version. Items and block are changed also.**
# Banners
![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be8ea89e29ec6f7a58f1731b177809714f30eeeb.png) ![Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3991e398f5959c651e92ce231abecfe348f594.png)
![Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05467ac3bce4d3b47b97f8902f1efb4b41aa1982.png)
![Enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/585eb2094e8478eba4b32ae71cc32de21c3a3399.png)
![Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57fddd70c6908320e9b342841d4dbc371eba09bb.png)
# socials
## planet Minecraft
**This pack is available on [Planet Minecraft ](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/malice-manifest/)**
![Planet Minecraft ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2733272c22229682481ad54fdc5f0199e54795b7.png)
## Discord
**Checkout my [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/TyqqGbk9d8)**
![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/321c1fccc3e4feeee134a5ed3179f8085db780c3.png)
# requirements
## optifine
**this pack requires [Optifine](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&source=web&rct=j&opi=89978449&url=https://optifine.net/&ved=2ahUKEwjF_t6_woqGAxUq-wIHHe0JDCcQFnoECAYQAQ&usg=AOvVaw2NS-EqZbuwDRvTQoClDZXD)**
![Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50ed8691dabc89ed1f1ce84f6960252ac09d7173.png)
